fundamentals.latest_results_summary: TCS reported a strong quarter with double-digit growth in digital services. The operating margin remained resilient despite macroeconomic headwinds. Management expressed optimism about the AI and Cloud transformation pipeline.

news.title: TCS Secures Mega Deal with European Bank
news.content: Tata Consultancy Services announced a multi-year partnership to modernize the core banking systems of a leading European bank, leveraging its proprietary AI-driven platforms.

news.title: TCS Q4 Results Highlight Resilient Margins
news.content: TCS's latest quarterly results showed an operating margin of 24.5%, beating analyst expectations despite global slowdown concerns.

fundamentals.latest_results_summary: HDFC Bank showcased robust credit growth across retail and corporate segments. Asset quality improved slightly, and the net interest margin stabilized at 3.8%.

news.title: HDFC Expands Branch Network in Semi-Urban Areas
news.content: HDFC Bank plans to open 500 new branches in semi-urban and rural areas to drive financial inclusion and capture emerging market growth.

fundamentals.latest_results_summary: ICICI Bank reported record profits driven by high net interest margins (4.1%) and strong fee income. Provisions for bad loans declined significantly.

news.title: ICICI Bank Launches New Digital Lending Platform
news.content: To compete with fintech startups, ICICI Bank unveiled a fully digital lending platform offering instant personal and business loans.
